Med..personality: A restless, hurried individual who feels perpetually behind, moving through life with an anxious urgency that leaves them breathless and faint. They are intensely sensitive — physically to touch, cold, and pain, and socially to the presence and energy of others, recoiling from contact with anyone not 'en rapport.' There is a general decline in vitality giving them a pale, waxy, prematurely aged appearance despite inner agitation.
Med..mental_state: The mind is foggy and unreliable — forgetful of facts, names, and figures, making errors in writing and spelling, losing the thread of thought mid-sentence. There is a pervasive sense of unreality, as if everything around them is strange and disconnected, accompanied by paranoid ideation: hearing whispers, seeing faces peering from behind furniture, feeling a presence behind them. A wild, desperate feeling borders on incipient insanity, with confusion so profound they struggle to articulate their own symptoms.
Med..emotional_pattern: Emotionally volatile and rapidly changeable — sad one moment, mirthful the next — with an undercurrent of deep dread and foreboding, including presentiments of death and anxiety about spiritual salvation. They weep easily when speaking, wake in fright as though something terrible has occurred, and fear the dark and being alone at night. An evening exhilaration temporarily lifts the mood but cannot mask the pervasive despair and growing sense of losing control.
